calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Interlink Business Development is present. Represented by Tom Carpio.
Attorney, Brenda Cruz Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Xuan Diep and Jennie Tran, are present.
Attorney, James Maccoun , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Sandy McNabb, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-30-2010 is vacated.
